properties.effects: Euphoria, increased energy/alertness, Decreased need for sleep, Increased sociability, mood lift, increased libido, Excessive talking, Decreased appetite, Weight loss, Sweating, Disturbed sleep patterns, Bruxia, Visual and auditory hallucinations, itchiness, aggressiveness, moodiness.
properties.summary: A monoamine triple releaser first synthesised by David Nichols, possesses similar properties to MDMA. It is suspected to be neurotoxic however more research is needed to say.
properties.warning: Note: It seems /most/ of the market for this drug is infact largely falsified.
